```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?country ?countryLabel ?court ?courtLabel ?judge ?judgeLabel ?appointmentMethod ?appointmentMethodLabel WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P175 wd:Q31687 ; wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?court wdt:P17 ?country ; wdt:P31 wd:Q5080529 .
  ?court p:P159 ?membershipStatement .
  ?membershipStatement ps:P159 ?judge .
  ?judge wdt:P1275 ?appointmentMethod .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?court rdfs:label ?courtLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?courtLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?judge rdfs:label ?judgeLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?judgeLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?appointmentMethod rdfs:label ?appointmentMethodLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?appointmentMethodLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
```
